allow: Bash(node -e "const p = JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('package.json','utf8'\)\); console.log\('next:', p.dependencies.next\); console.log\('react:', p.dependencies.react\); console.log\('motion:', p.dependencies.motion\); console.log\('@vercel/analytics:', p.dependencies['@vercel/analytics']\);")

Bash(node -e "const p = JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('package.json','utf8'\)\); console.log\('tailwindcss:', p.devDependencies.tailwindcss\); console.log\('@tailwindcss/postcss:', p.devDependencies['@tailwindcss/postcss']\); console.log\('autoprefixer:', p.devDependencies.autoprefixer || 'gone'\)")

Bash(node -e "const p=JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('package.json','utf8'\)\); console.log\('dep uuid:', p.dependencies.uuid\); console.log\('dev @types/uuid:', p.devDependencies['@types/uuid'] || p.dependencies['@types/uuid']\);")

Bash(node -e "const p=JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('package.json','utf8'\)\); console.log\('zustand:', p.dependencies.zustand\); console.log\('date-fns:', p.dependencies['date-fns']\); console.log\('date-fns-tz:', p.dependencies['date-fns-tz']\); console.log\('uuid:', p.dependencies.uuid || 'gone'\); console.log\('@types/uuid:', p.devDependencies?.['@types/uuid'] || p.dependencies?.['@types/uuid'] || 'gone'\);")

Bash(node -e "const p=JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('package.json','utf8'\)\); console.log\('date-fns:', p.dependencies['date-fns']\); console.log\('date-fns-tz:', p.dependencies['date-fns-tz']\); console.log\('zustand:', p.dependencies.zustand\);")
